subject: [PATCH 06/14] sunrpc: add helpers to count and snapshot pending cache requests

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the use of cache_get() reference in sunrpc_cache_requests_snapshot(), suggesting an alternative approach to ensure safe access to the request list.

2026-03-16.patch_summary: This patch series adds helpers to count and snapshot pending cache requests in the sunrpc subsystem, allowing callers to safely access the request list without exposing internal struct cache_request details.
